stories.title: Who is held accountable if a war crime is committed in Iran?
stories.description: NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with international law expert Gabor Rona about attacks on civilian infrastructure in the Iran conflict and how they may constitute war crimes.

stories.title: Is the U.S. Navy ready to clear sea mines in the Persian Gulf?
stories.description: Despite the danger of sea mines, experts say that mine clearing has received minimal attention and funding from the U.S. Navy — and it's often overshadowed by more high-profile weapons systems.

stories.title: Trump to address nation at critical moment in his war with Iran
stories.description: The address comes after weeks of uncertainty over when and how the U.S. could extricate itself from the conflict.

stories.title: Trump to address nation on Iran war. And, SCOTUS considers birthright citizenship
stories.description: Trump is set to address the nation after saying the U.S. will withdraw from Iran in 2-3 weeks. And, the president will be at the Supreme Court today as arguments on birthright citizenship begin.

stories.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as Trump is set to deliver a speech on the Iran war
stories.description: As Israel expands its invasion of Lebanon, the White House says President Trump will provide "an important update" to the nation on the Iran war.

stories.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad
stories.description: The US state department says a suspect in her abduction has ties to an Iran-backed militia group, Kataib Hezbollah.

stories.title: 'You're no longer my sister' - rows erupt as war divides Iranian families
stories.description: People in Iran describe angry scenes and tense relationships as rifts open up over the war.

stories.title: Israel says it will keep control over part of southern Lebanon after war with Hezbollah ends
stories.description: Defence Minister Israel Katz also says houses in Lebanese villages near the Israeli border will be demolished.

stories.title: Iran using children in security roles in war, reports and witnesses say
stories.description: An 11-year-old is reported to have been killed in an air strike while manning a checkpoint in Tehran.

stories.title: How the US could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island
stories.description: Donald Trump has indicated he could send troops to take control of Iran's key oil export terminal.

stories.title: Latin Patriarch will have access to Jerusalem holy site after police stopped entry
stories.description: The Israeli PM says Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa had been asked not to enter the church over concerns about Iranian strikes.

stories.title: Potential Houthi threat to Red Sea shipping could further damage global economy
stories.description: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.

stories.title: Palestinian man killed as death toll from West Bank settler violence climbs
stories.description: Mohammad al-Malhi is the seventh Palestinian killed by a settler in a surge of violence since the start of the war with Iran.

stories.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
stories.description: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib and Mohamed Ftouni, alleging they also belonged to Hezbollah's military wing.

stories.title: UN human rights chief calls on US to conclude probe into Iran school strike
stories.description: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.

stories.title: 'A million things could go wrong' - why seizing Iran's uranium would be so risky for the US
stories.description: Seizing the stockpile would be one of the "most complicated special operations in history", a former defence official tells the BBC.

stories.title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
stories.description: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.

stories.title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
stories.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

stories.title: Is Trump's pause on attacking Iranian energy for diplomacy or an escalation?
stories.description: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.

stories.title: How the Hormuz closure could affect food, medicines and smartphones
stories.description: The price of a wide range of goods - from food, to smartphones, to medicines - could be affected by the US-Israel war with Iran.

stories.title: Trump to deliver 'important update' on Iran war in televised speech
stories.description: Donald Trump will give an “important update” on the Iran war in a prime-time televised address to the American nation on Wednesday evening, which is expected to reiterate the president's timeline for rolling back US military operations in the region.

stories.title: Trump administration lifts sanctions on Venezuela’s interim leader
stories.description: The US has lifted sanctions on Delcy Rodriguez, Venezuela’s interim president, in a significant shift following the ouster of Nicolas Maduro. The move comes as relations between Washington and Caracas begin to thaw, with Rodriguez taking steps to open the country’s energy sector ...

stories.title: 'It's a nightmare for Keir Starmer' as UK PM sees 'special relationship' with US unravel
stories.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Wednesday that the global instability caused by the Iran war means Britain should pivot to focusing on closer economic and defence ties with Europe, ​following repeated criticism ‌from Trump. Quentin Peel, Associate Fellow on the Europe Prog...

stories.title: Trump claims Iran wants a ceasefire, Iran says remarks are ‘false and baseless’
stories.description: Donald Trump has claimed that Iran has asked the United States for a ceasefire -- adding that Washington would only consider it when the Strait of Hormuz reopens. Tehran, though, has denied this -- the Foreign Ministry calling Trump's remarks "baseless." It comes hours ahead of t...

stories.title: When the oil runs dry: What next for globalization as Asia bears brunt of Iran war?
stories.description: Are we staring at globalization's biggest turning point since the end of the Cold War? With Asia feeling the pain of Donald Trump's war against Iran, with steadfast US allies like the Philippines forced to declare an energy emergency, there's the immediate chain reaction for the ...

stories.title: Transatlantic rift widens as Trump lashes out at NATO
stories.description: President Donald Trump has said he is strongly considering pulling the US out of NATO, ratcheting up his criticism of European allies and exposing a wider rift in the transatlantic alliance — this time over America's war alongside Israel against Iran.

stories.title: Bedouins in Israel’s Negev desert face bomb shelter shortage
stories.description: As Iranian and Hezbollah air strikes on Israel continue, tens of thousands of Bedouins living in the country’s southern Negev desert have no access to shelters. While some NGOs are attempting to install mobile shelters, they are primarily calling on the government to take action,...

stories.title: NASA moon mission a ‘contrast’ to US war on Iran, says US senator
stories.description: Astronauts have boarded NASA’s Orion capsule as they prepare for the first crewed lunar mission in more than 50 years.

stories.title: Smoke and embers seen over Iran’s Isfahan after strike
stories.description: Video captured a massive column of smoke and burning embers towering over Isfahan, Iran following a US-Israeli strike.

stories.title: ‘Which interests being served by war?’ Iran’s Pezeshkian asks US public
stories.description: In open letter, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian urges Americans to see beyond 'flood of distortions' as war rages.

stories.title: Central Israel hit by one of Iran’s largest missile barrages in weeks
stories.description: One of Iran’s largest missile barrages in weeks injured at least 14 people and caused damage across several Israel.

stories.title: Why Iran says its universities are being targeted
stories.description: Iran reportedly follows through on threat on American universities, after attacks on two Iranian research universities.

stories.title: Iran authorities await war ‘victory’ as supporters mark 1979 anniversary
stories.description: Officials, government supporters take to streets to mark Islamic Republic Day, even as US, Israel continue bombing.

stories.title: Iranian officials ‘laugh’ at Trump’s claim Iran wants a ceasefire
stories.description: A senior Iranian official has laughed in response to US President Donald Trump's claim that Iran asked for a ceasefire.

stories.title: Kenya’s tea industry suffers crisis caused by the US-Israeli war on Iran
stories.description: Kenyan tea farmers are facing a crisis after the US-Israeli war on Iran disrupted key export routes to the Middle East.

stories.title: UK to host meeting of 35 countries on reopening Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Before talks with 35 countries, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says reopening strait 'will not be easy'.

stories.title: Occupied West Bank on strike against Israeli death penalty law
stories.description: Palestinian shops and public institutions were closed across the occupied West Bank on Wednesday in protest of an Israeli law passed earlier this week permitting the execution of Palestinians convicted of deadly terror attacks. In the Palestinian territory’s main cities of Hebron...

stories.title: Trump to address nation at 9pm EST, outline Iran war endgame as Washington debates next phase
stories.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump is set to address his nation at 9pm EST on Wednesday (6:00am on Thursday in Pakistan) to provide what the White House has described as “an important update on Iran,” fuelling speculation that he may declare an end to the five-week conflict — ...

stories.title: Spanish police open probe into anti-Muslim chants at friendly match with Egypt
stories.description: Police in Spain said on Wednesday that they were investigating “Islamophobic and xenophobic” chants heard during the Spain-Egypt international football match in Barcelona. Egypt’s national anthem was jeered ahead of the 0-0 draw in Barcelona on Tuesday in a pre-World Cup friendly...

stories.title: China’s FM Wang Yi appreciates Pakistan’s active diplomatic efforts in promoting Middle East peace: FO
stories.description: China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi has conveyed Beijing’s appreciation for Pakistan’s “active diplomatic role” and efforts towards ending the Middle East conflict, the Foreign Office (FO) said on Wednesday. Wang made the remarks during his meeting with Deputy Prime Minister and For...

stories.title: Buy jet fuel from US or get your own, Trump rails against allies
stories.description: • Hegseth claims next few days to be ‘decisive’, says conflict to intensify if deal not made• Pezeshkian says Iran wants to end war but not without guarantees; Araghchi confirms messages exchanged with US, denies talks• Iranian missiles injure nine in Tel Aviv; US companies in re...

stories.title: Read the full text of Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian’s letter to the American public
stories.description: Iran President Masoud Pezeshkian has released an open letter, addressing the American people, calling on them to question the motives of the ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran. Below is the full text of his letter. “In the name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful “To the people o...

stories.title: Arab states lost $186bn in first month of war, UN official says
stories.description: AMMAN/SINGAPORE: The war sparked by the joint US-Israeli attack on Iran and which has spread across the Middle East has cost Arab countries $186 billion, a top UN official said on Tuesday, as he called for an immediate halt to the fighting. “We hope the fighting will stop tomorro...

stories.title: Pentagon denies Hegseth’s broker wanted to invest in arms before war
stories.description: WASHINGTON: The United States Department of Defence has called for the withdrawal of a newspaper report alleging that a broker linked to Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth sought to make a significant investment in weapons companies ahead of the war with Iran, Al Jazeera reported. Pe...

stories.title: King Charles to pay state visit to US as UK seeks to mollify Trump
stories.description: King Charles will make a state visit to the United States in late April, Buckingham Palace said on Tuesday, a high-profile trip that the British government hopes will help to repair relations with President Donald Trump, damaged by the war on Iran. Charles and his wife Queen Cami...

stories.title: Pakistan, China issue 5-point initiative for restoring peace in Middle East
stories.description: Pakistan and China on Tuesday issued a five-point initiative for restoring peace and stability in the Gulf and the Middle East amid the US-Israeli war on Iran, in which they called on the immediate cessation of hostilities and starting peace talks as soon as possible. The develop...

stories.title: Pakistan, seven other countries condemn Israeli curbs on Muslim and Christian worship in occupied Jerusalem
stories.description: Pakistan, along with seven other countries, condemned the restrictions imposed by Israel on the freedom of worship for Muslims and Christians in occupied Jerusalem, the Foreign Office (FO) said on Tuesday. Since Israel and the United States started a war with Iran on Feb 28, Isra...

stories.title: ‘Diplomacy takes time’: Pak envoy reaffirms Islamabad’s commitment to Iran-US peace amid complex situation
stories.description: Pakistan’s Ambassador to the US Rizwan Saeed Sheikh has reaffirmed Islamabad’s commitment to facilitating dialogue between the United States and Iran, even as regional tensions intensify. In an interview broadcast on Tuesday, Ambassador Sheikh told Fox News that Pakistan is “comm...

stories.title: Pak-China talks in Beijing to ‘refine’ framework for possible US-Iran dialogue
stories.description: https://www.dawn.com/news/1986999

stories.title: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Trump claims Iran President has asked for a ceasefire; Tehran calls it 'false, baseless'
stories.description: Mr. Trump said, in a post on Truth Social, that the U.S. will consider the ceasefire once the Strait of Hormuz is "open, free, and clear" and the bombings will continue until then

stories.title: Trump says Iran president requests ceasfire, Tehran says 'false'
stories.description: Pezeshkian had said Iran had the "necessary will" for a ceasefire, but only if its foes guaranteed that hostilities would not return

stories.title: Israeli strike on Beirut kills senior Hezbollah commander
stories.description: Several large blasts were heard across the city on April 1, 2026, and a column of smoke was seen rising from Jnah, which is home to apartment buildings, cafes and shops

stories.title: As American bombs fall on Iran, South American countries brace for impact
stories.description: The kidnapping of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro still hangs over Latin America as countries fear getting sucked into Trump’s so-called war on narco-terrorism

stories.title: Trump is at a strategic dead end on Iran; the war will reshape Gulf’s security architecture: Johns Hopkins professor Vali Nasr
stories.description: In an interview with The Hindu, Vali Nasr said Iran might be open for a deal on its nuclear programme but not on its missiles or its control over the Strait of Hormuz

stories.title: Watch: Trump says Iranian leader has ‘asked for ceasefire’
stories.description: Iran’s new leader has asked the United States for a ceasefire, U.S. President Donald Trump said in a Truth Social post on Wednesday (April 1). Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson ‌said Trump’s statement about a ‌ceasefire ⁠request was false and ⁠baseless.

stories.title: U.K. can lead Strait’s opening, Starmer says, as transatlantic ties fray
stories.description: This is not our war and we will not be drawn into the conflict that is not in our national interest, Starmer said, reiterating U.K.’s position of staying out of the U.S.-Israel war on Iran

stories.title: Trump says Iran war could end in ‘two weeks, maybe three’, to address the nation
stories.description: The White House announced meanwhile that Donald Trump would give an address to the nation at 9:00 pm EST Wednesday (6.30 a.m. IST Thursday) "to provide an important update on Iran."

stories.title: Iran’s uranium enrichment secures independence, peaceful atom — supreme leader
stories.description: Ali Khamenei added that the US and other countries are not interested in Iran's progress and have put forward conditions presupposing a complete halt of uranium enrichment on Iranian territory

stories.title: Tehran could weigh nuclear deal with US with Iran-based enrichment consortium — Axios
stories.description: According to the report, a sixth round of talks on the Iranian nuclear program between the US president’s Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Iran’s top diplomat, Abbas Araghchi, could be held this weekend in a Middle Eastern country

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
